task_completion.description: Open a Daily chart for SPY in NinjaTrader 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A NinjaTrader chart window is open, displaying 'SPY' and 'Daily' (or '1 Day' / 'D') in the chart tab or title bar.

task_completion.description: Place a Horizontal Line drawing tool on the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A horizontal line is visible drawn across the chart area.

task_completion.description: Set the Horizontal Line price level to $500.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The horizontal line aligns with the 500.00 mark on the right-side price axis, or a properties window shows the Y-value/price set to approximately 500.00 (acceptable tolerance ±1.0).

task_completion.description: Enable the internal alert for the Horizontal Line with the condition 'Cross Above'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An alert configuration window or drawing tool properties panel is open, showing the alert is enabled and the condition is set to 'Cross Above' or 'Crosses Above'.

task_completion.description: Save the workspace to persist the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent accesses the Workspaces menu in the NinjaTrader Control Center and clicks 'Save', or a workspace save confirmation/action is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the chart and alert.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with NinjaTrader 8 menus, chart windows, and dialog boxes, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by directly editing workspace XML files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad, VS Code) or terminal windows are shown editing NinjaTrader workspace XML files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine NinjaTrader 8 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches NinjaTrader 8, with its distinct Control Center and charting UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Instrument: SPY. Drawing Tool: Horizontal Line. Price Level: 500.0 (acceptable tolerance is ±1.0, e.g., 499.0 to 501.0). Alert Condition: 'Cross Above' or 'Crosses Above'. The agent must configure this via the NinjaTrader 8 GUI.
